## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion on GrowthX's AI-powered content creation platform and potential engagement with ROAR for Good.](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX uses a combination of AI workflows and human oversight to produce high-quality, factual content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [ROAR for Good is interested in leveraging content to capture high-intent keywords and establish topical authority in their industry](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
  - [Potential engagement would start with a 6-8 week strategy sprint ($20k), followed by a 12-month execution phase (starting \~$15k/month)](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
  - [ROAR team needs to discuss internally and reconvene with GrowthX in early August to move forward](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Platform Overview

  - [AI-powered workflows for research, content creation, and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Human-in-the-loop approach for quality control and refinement](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Integration of multiple AI tools (e.g., Perplexity Pro, Claude) for optimal results](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Platform features include assignment creation, deep research, outline generation, and AI-powered chat for refinements](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)

### Content Strategy Opportunities

  - [Compliance tracker/hub concept similar to Homebase's state labor law pages](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [Potential to capture high search volume and develop topical authority](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [Opportunity to educate audience and convert traffic over time](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [AI content can help scale efforts and build "muscle" for ranking on high-demand keywords](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)

### ROAR for Good's Content Needs

  - [Focus on enterprise inbound leads and large business integrators](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Maintain small business leads without additional investment](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Potential for dual-purpose content serving both direct customers and enablement for integrators](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [White space in the industry for authoritative content on compliance and safety issues](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)

### Engagement Model and Pricing

  - [Phase 1: 6-8 week strategy sprint ($20,000)](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
  - [Phase 2: 12-month execution contract (starting around $15,000/month)](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [Flexibility to adjust scope and pricing based on specific needs](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [Typical booking is several weeks in advance](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to share meeting notes and additional details](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1881.0)
  - [ROAR team to internally discuss engagement potential and ROI milestones](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)
  - [Tentative follow-up meeting scheduled for August 8th](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
  - [ROAR to consider timeline and potential September start if moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/U9hnPbS93SHZ8X5_KgXzXfdcUg9QhbqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1905.0)
